name: codebuddy-connectors-official
description: CodeBuddy 官方连接器配置索引

connectors.name: QQ邮箱
connectors.description: Send, search, and organize your QQ Mail inbox. Read emails, summarize threads, and manage folders with natural language.
connectors.description_zh: 收发、搜索和整理 QQ 邮件。用自然语言读取邮件内容、汇总邮件线程、管理文件夹。
connectors.description_en: Send, search, and organize your QQ Mail inbox. Read emails, summarize threads, and manage folders with natural language.
examples_zh: 找出最近两周来自 hr@company.com 的所有邮件，按时间排序，告诉我总共有几封、主要说的是什么
帮我生成上周的邮件汇总：来自客户的有多少封、来自内部同事的有多少封、哪个主题（销售/技术/运营）的邮件最多
搜索所有主题包含【报销】或【发票】且来自财务部的邮件，列出发件人、日期和摘要，我需要核对一笔款项
把所有标记为【星标】或【重要】的未读邮件整理成一份清单，按发件时间从新到旧排列，帮我快速决定优先处理哪封
examples_en: Find all emails from hr@company.com in the past two weeks, sort by date, and tell me the total count and key topics
Generate a weekly email summary: how many are from clients, how many from internal colleagues, and which topic (sales/tech/ops) has the most
Search all emails with subject containing 'reimbursement' or 'invoice' from the finance team, list sender, date, and summary
Organize all starred or important unread emails into a list sorted by newest first, so I can decide which to handle first

connectors.name: 腾讯乐享
connectors.description: Search, create, and manage documents in your Lexiang knowledge base. Import Markdown, organize by tags, and keep team docs up to date.
connectors.description_zh: 搜索、创建和管理乐享知识库中的文档。支持导入 Markdown、按标签整理内容、追踪团队文档的更新动态。
connectors.description_en: Search, create, and manage documents in your Lexiang knowledge base. Import Markdown, organize by tags, and keep team docs up to date.
examples_zh: 在乐享知识库里搜索所有包含【API 接口】的文档，返回匹配的文档标题、最后编辑时间和简要内容摘要
找出【技术方案】知识库里所有超过 3 个月没有更新的文档，列出文档名称和最后编辑人，我需要推动大家更新
把一份 Markdown 格式的【2025 年技术规划】导入到乐享，自动转换成带层级结构的知识库文档，保留代码块和表格格式
从乐享的【产品文档】知识库里提取所有标记为【v2.0】标签的文档，整理成一份版本文档清单，并生成目录导航
我要整理乐享里的所有【待办事项】相关文档，把它们统一移到【个人管理】文件夹，并更新标签分类
搜索乐享知识库中最近 7 天被编辑过的所有文档，按编辑频次排序，告诉我团队最近关注的热点话题是什么
examples_en: Search the lexiang knowledge base for all documents containing 'API interface', return matching titles, last edit time, and brief content summary
Find all documents in the 'Technical Solutions' knowledge base not updated for over 3 months, list document names and last editor — I need to prompt updates
Import a Markdown file '2025 Tech Roadmap' into lexiang, auto-convert to hierarchical knowledge base docs while preserving code blocks and tables
Extract all documents tagged with 'v2.0' from the 'Product Docs' knowledge base, compile a version documentation list and generate a navigation index
I want to organize all 'TODO' related documents in lexiang, move them to the 'Personal Management' folder, and update tag classifications
Search for all documents edited in lexiang within the past 7 days, rank by edit frequency, and tell me what topics the team is most focused on

connectors.name: 腾讯文档
connectors.description: Create, edit, and collaborate on Tencent Docs. Manage spreadsheets, documents, and slides with natural language.
connectors.description_zh: 创建、编辑和协作腾讯文档。用自然语言管理在线表格、文档和幻灯片，轻松完成内容查询、数据整理和团队协同。
connectors.description_en: Create, edit, and collaborate on Tencent Docs. Manage spreadsheets, documents, and slides with natural language.
examples_zh: 帮我在腾讯文档里新建一个在线表格，包含姓名、部门、入职日期三列，并填入示例数据
打开我最近编辑的腾讯文档，帮我总结文档的主要内容和关键要点
在腾讯文档的表格里查找所有【销售额】大于 10 万的记录，按金额从高到低排序
帮我把这份会议纪要整理成腾讯文档，按议题分段并标注负责人和截止日期
examples_en: Create a new spreadsheet in Tencent Docs with columns for name, department, and hire date, and fill in sample data
Open my recently edited Tencent Doc and summarize the main content and key points
Search the Tencent Docs spreadsheet for all records where sales exceed 100k, sorted by amount descending
Organize these meeting notes into a Tencent Doc, split by topic with owners and deadlines noted
